business_ideas.idea: Arbitrage ride-sharing credits by using referral system and minor rides as new users.
Income share agreement platform for minor league baseball players (pre-major league).
Back-office insurance company serving rental agents at point of lease.
Hidden back-office brokerage for real estate agents to keep their brand.
Data scraping service for Shopify store competitor analysis and sales tracking.

predictions.text: Income share agreements will expand beyond education into sports, entertainment.
Agents will abandon brokerages for hidden back-office models with lower fees.
Real estate has highest ratio of wealthy to genius entrepreneurs of any sector.
